title: colony PCR
author: Igem Dusseldorf

steps_raw.instruction: transfer some cells to 10 µL sterile MilliQ
use 1 µl of reaction for colony PCR
you can also use redtaq polymerase etc. %s %s %s %s
2 µl of reaction can be used for loading the gel
